manifest.name: fast-json-patch
manifest.description: Fast implementation of JSON-Patch (RFC-6902) with duplex (observe changes) capabilities

scripts.tsc: npm run tsc-common && npm run tsc-module
scripts.tsc-module: tsc --module esnext --moduleResolution node --outDir "module/" && npm run tsc-to-mjs
scripts.version: npm run tsc && webpack && git add -A
scripts.test: npm run tsc && npm run test-core && npm run test-duplex && npm run test-commonjs && npm run test-webpack-import && npm run test-typings
scripts.bench: npm run bench-core && npm run bench-duplex
